children.name: Discover Our History, Mission, and Vision
children.characters: Discover Our History, Mission, and Vision

children.name: A.M. FOFANA Islamic & English High School was founded on February 15, 1977, by the visionary Sheikh Ahmad M. Fofana. With a deep commitment to providing quality education that combines Islamic values with modern academic excellence, he established this institution to serve the community.
children.characters: A.M. FOFANA Islamic & English High School was founded on February 15, 1977, by the visionary Sheikh Ahmad M. Fofana. With a deep commitment to providing quality education that combines Islamic values with modern academic excellence, he established this institution to serve the community.

children.name: What started as a small school with just a handful of students has grown into one of the most respected educational institutions in Liberia, with over 1,500 students and 85+ dedicated teachers
children.characters: What started as a small school with just a handful of students has grown into one of the most respected educational institutions in Liberia, with over 1,500 students and 85+ dedicated teachers

children.name: For more than four decades, we have remained true to our founding principles while adapting to meet the evolving needs of our students and society.
children.characters: For more than four decades, we have remained true to our founding principles while adapting to meet the evolving needs of our students and society.

children.name: To provide a comprehensive education that nurtures the intellectual, spiritual, and moral development of our students. We aim to produce graduates who are academically excellent, morally upright, and committed to serving their communities with integrity and compassion.

children.name: "Education is not merely about acquiring knowledge; it is about building character, nurturing faith, and preparing young minds to contribute positively to society. At A.M. FOFANA High School, we are committed to providing an environment where every student can thrive academically, spiritually, and socially."
children.characters: "Education is not merely about acquiring knowledge; it is about building character, nurturing faith, and preparing young minds to contribute positively to society. At A.M. FOFANA High School, we are committed to providing an environment where every student can thrive academically, spiritually, and socially."

children.name: As we continue to build on the legacy of our founder, Sheikh A.M. Fofana, we remain dedicated to excellence in education and character development. Our students are our future, and we take great pride in shaping them into responsible citizens and faithful Muslims.
children.characters: As we continue to build on the legacy of our founder, Sheikh A.M. Fofana, we remain dedicated to excellence in education and character development. Our students are our future, and we take great pride in shaping them into responsible citizens and faithful Muslims.

children.name: Serving the community of Monrovia since 1977. We believe that education is the ultimate key to unlocking a bright future.Serving the community of Monrovia since 1977. We believe that education is the ultimate key to unlocking a bright future.
